---
title: "Statistical Report"
author: "Lena"
date: "May - June 2025"
output: 
  word_document: 
    toc: true
  pdf_document: 
    toc: true
abstract: >
  This report summarises the cleaning and descriptive analysis of patient-level breast cancer data from Sarajevo Cancer Hospital.
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)

file_path <- "C:/Users/cm1om/Documents/GIT Projects/Breast_cancer_BiH/Named_dataset.xlsx"
data <- read_excel(file_path, skip = 3)
col_pos <- which(names(data) == "Palliative")
data <- data[, 1:col_pos]
nrow(data)
